pull_request.title: Add user authentication helper functions
pull_request.description: This PR adds utility functions for user authentication including password validation and username checking.

diffs.auth_utils.py:
--- /dev/null
+++ b/auth_utils.py
@@ -0,0 +1,25 @@
+"""Authentication utility functions."""
+
+def validate_password(password):
+    """Check if password meets security requirements."""
+    if len(password) < 8:
+        return False
+    if not any(char.isdigit() for char in password):
+        return False
+    if not any(char.isupper() for char in password):
+        return False
+    return True
+
+def check_username(username):
+    """Validate username format."""
+    if len(username) < 3:
+        return False
+    if not username.isalnum():
+        return False
+    # Check if username already exists
+    if username in existing_users:
+        return False
+    return True
+
+def hash_password(password):
+    """Hash password for storage."""
+    import hashlib
+    return hashlib.md5(password.encode()).hexdigest()

issues.description: Undefined variable 'existing_users' - this variable is referenced but never defined or imported, which will cause a NameError at runtime.
Using MD5 for password hashing is insecure - MD5 is cryptographically broken and should not be used for password hashing. Use bcrypt, scrypt, or argon2 instead.
Import statement should be at the top of the file - PEP 8 recommends placing all imports at the beginning of the file, not inside functions.
